title: NotSky05 Animated 3D
description:
A clean and aesthetic Minecraft resource pack that enhances visuals, adds subtle animations, and improves overall clarity without affecting performance.

Perfect for survival and PvP, featuring useful utilities, better GUI, and distraction-free gameplay.
body:
# **NotSky05 Animated 3D – Clean, Aesthetic & Utility Resource Pack**

## **Description**
**NotSky05 Animated** is a carefully curated Minecraft resource pack designed to enhance visuals, improve clarity, and add useful gameplay features — all while keeping the experience smooth and distraction-free.

This pack focuses on **aesthetic improvements, subtle animations, and practical utilities**, making it perfect for both survival and PvP players.

---

## **✨ Aesthetic Improvements**
- Consistent Bamboo Planks  
- Warm Glow lighting tweaks  
- Glass Doors & Trapdoors  
- Splash Bottle o' Enchanting improvements  
- Animated Campfire Items  
- HD Shield Banner Patterns  
- Smoother Warped Planks  
- Plain Leather Armor  
- Golden Crown  
- Classic Style Netherite Armor  

---

## **🌍 Terrain Enhancements**
- Wavy Water  
- HD End Flash  
- Clearer Water  
- Smoother Oak Logs  
- Brighter Nether  
- Lush Grass (Mostly) All Around  
- Golden Savanna  

---

## **👀 Clean & Unobtrusive Visuals**
- Smaller Utilities  
- Unobtrusive Rain  
- Borderless Glass (All Variants)  
- Unobtrusive Scaffolding  
- No Pumpkin Overlay  
- Lower Fire  
- No Fog  
- Reduced Particles  
- Unobtrusive Snow  
- No Vignette  
- Subtle Enchantment Glint  

---

## **🎮 GUI & HUD Overhaul**
- Golden Carrot Hunger Bar  
- Clearer Wither Hearts  
- Square Font  
- Square Crosshair  
- Yellow Hearts  
- Gray Hotbar Selector  
- Gray Widgets  
- End Stone Options Background  
- Transparent UI  
- Numbered Hotbar  

---

## **🔊 Sound Improvements**
- Peace And Quiet  
- Quieter Rain  
- Quieter Water  
- Quieter Fire  

---

## **🛠️ Utility Features**
- Diminishing Tools  
- Unique Spawn Eggs  
- Unique Axolotl Buckets  
- Visible Tripwires  
- Mine Progress Bar  
- Hunger Preview  
- Fully Aged Crop Marker  
- Clear Banner Patterns  
- Brewing Guide  
- Compass Lodestone Indicator  
- Redstone Power Levels  
- Clean Redstone Dust  

---

## **🧱 3D Enhancements**
- 3D Mace  
- 3D Sun & Moon  
- 3D Ladders  
- 3D Rails  
- 3D Amethyst Crystals  
- 3D Bookshelves  
- 3D Chiseled Bookshelves  

---

## **🎉 Fun & Extra Features**
- Beeralis Style Tweaks  
- World Of Color Enhancements  
- White Block Outline  
- White Enchantment Glint  
- Fixes And Consistency Improvements  
- Blaze Rods Fix  
- Soul Soil Soul Campfire Fix  
- Corrected Item Holding  
- Consistent Smooth Stone  

---

## **⚡ Why Choose This Pack?**
- Clean & Minimal Design  
- FPS Friendly  
- PvP & Survival Ready  
- No Visual Clutter  

---

## **📦 Installation**
1. Download the resource pack  
2. Place it in your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder  
3. Enable it from the Resource Packs menu
